import { Observable } from '../Observable'; import { innerFrom } from './innerFrom'; import { EMPTY } from './empty'; export function using(resourceFactory, observableFactory) { return new Observable(function (subscriber) { var resource = resourceFactory(); var result = observableFactory(resource); var source = result ? innerFrom(result) : EMPTY; source.subscribe(subscriber); return function () { if (resource) { resource.unsubscribe(); } }; }); } //# sourceMappingURL=using.js.map
